scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run test
scripts.fix-lint: bun run --cwd apps/raycast fix-lint && bun run --cwd packages/core fix-lint && oxfmt --write .gitignore .oxfmtrc.json .oxlintrc.json README.md package.json tsconfig.base.json
scripts.format: bun run --cwd apps/raycast format && bun run --cwd packages/core format && oxfmt --write .gitignore .oxfmtrc.json .oxlintrc.json README.md package.json tsconfig.base.json
scripts.format:check: bun run --cwd apps/raycast format:check && bun run --cwd packages/core format:check && oxfmt --check .gitignore .oxfmtrc.json .oxlintrc.json README.md package.json tsconfig.base.json
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd apps/raycast lint && bun run --cwd packages/core lint
